user.title: Set up GrowAssistant – Crop Steering
user.description: Select the existing Home Assistant entities GrowAssistant will use. Pump control is not implemented in v0.1.

data_description.name: Display name for this GrowAssistant instance.
data_description.pump_switch: Switch entity for the irrigation pump. It is stored for future use only in v0.1.
data_description.led_day_sensor: Binary sensor that indicates whether the grow light day period is active.
data_description.vwc_sensor: Sensor entity that reports substrate volumetric water content.
data_description.drain_sensor: Optional binary sensor that indicates irrigation drain/runoff activity.
data_description.drain_tray_sensor: Optional binary sensor that indicates a drain tray leak or high-water condition.

abort.already_configured: GrowAssistant – Crop Steering is already configured.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Request a scaffold refresh. The irrigation engine is not implemented in v0.1.
